special_abilities.name: Combat Veteran
special_abilities.effect: Re-roll one failed to-hit roll per activation

special_abilities.name: Tactical Positioning
special_abilities.effect: May move 2" after making a ranged attack instead of standard 1"

special_abilities.name: Heavy Armor
special_abilities.effect: 4+ armor save due to corporate combat suit

special_abilities.name: Corporate Resources
special_abilities.effect: If killed, roll 1D6. On 6, reinforcements arrive (add 1 additional Corporate Security enemy next round)

special_abilities.name: Aggressive Tactics
special_abilities.effect: If within 6" of crew member at start of activation, must charge into brawling combat

special_abilities.name: Fearless
special_abilities.effect: Never makes morale checks, automatically passes panic tests

special_abilities.name: Tracking Expert
special_abilities.effect: Ignores cover bonuses when shooting at targets within 12"

special_abilities.name: Trophy Hunter
special_abilities.effect: Gains +1 to hit against any character that has killed another enemy this battle

special_abilities.name: Quick Draw
special_abilities.effect: May fire immediately when activated, before moving

special_abilities.name: Psionic Powers
special_abilities.effect: Knows 2 random psionic powers (requires Trailblazer's Toolkit). If TT not owned, replace with +1 Combat Skill and Hand Cannon.

special_abilities.name: Mental Fortitude
special_abilities.effect: Immune to Stun and Suggestion psionic powers

special_abilities.name: Cybernetic Enhancement
special_abilities.effect: 5+ armor save from built-in plating

special_abilities.name: Hive Mind
special_abilities.effect: All Converted enemies within 6" gain +1 Reactions

special_abilities.name: Relentless
special_abilities.effect: Ignore first casualty result, treat as Knocked Out instead

special_abilities.name: Honor Duel
special_abilities.effect: If engaged in brawl, K'Erin Warrior Elite rolls 3 dice and picks best two

special_abilities.name: Warrior Pride
special_abilities.effect: Cannot voluntarily leave combat once engaged. Gains +1 Combat Skill if outnumbered in brawl

special_abilities.name: Battle Cry
special_abilities.effect: All K'Erin enemies within 8" gain +1 to morale checks

special_abilities.name: Leadership
special_abilities.effect: All Pirate enemies within 8" gain +1 to hit rolls

special_abilities.name: Ruthless
special_abilities.effect: May execute friendly pirate within 2" to automatically pass morale check for all pirates

special_abilities.name: Lucky
special_abilities.effect: Has 1 Luck point (can avoid one fatal injury)

special_abilities.name: Heavy Plating
special_abilities.effect: 4+ armor save

special_abilities.name: Targeting Matrix
special_abilities.effect: Ignores penalties for shooting while moving

special_abilities.name: Automated Repair
special_abilities.effect: At start of each round, roll 1D6. On 5+, heal 1 damage

special_abilities.name: No Pain
special_abilities.effect: Immune to Stun markers and panic

special_abilities.name: Pack Leader
special_abilities.effect: All Feral enemies within 6" may re-roll failed initiative checks

special_abilities.name: Primal Fury
special_abilities.effect: When in brawl, gains +1 Combat Skill for each friendly Feral within 2"

special_abilities.name: Enhanced Senses
special_abilities.effect: Cannot be surprised, always acts in Quick Actions phase

elite_enemy_deployment_rules.standard_replacement: When rolling for enemy types, may replace one standard enemy with elite version by spending +1 deployment point per elite
elite_enemy_deployment_rules.elite_only_battles: For maximum challenge, all enemies can be elite versions (multiply deployment points by 1.5x)
elite_enemy_deployment_rules.mixed_squads: For balanced challenge, 1 elite per 3 standard enemies
elite_enemy_deployment_rules.boss_battles: Single elite enemy with +50% deployment points can serve as mission boss
